name: Saravanakumar Arunachalam

profileSummary.title: Senior Platform Engineer / AI Infrastructure Engineer
profileSummary.content: Senior platform and AI infrastructure engineer with 14+ years of experience building reliable, cloud-native systems for high-scale production environments. Specialist in Kubernetes, AI infrastructure, RAG pipelines, LLM inference, and SRE practices, with hands-on delivery across serverless platforms, distributed systems, and observability. Currently leading platform engineering and AI-enabled workloads at GEICO, with experience spanning GitOps, autoscaling, incident response, and production reliability. Relocating to India (Chennai/Coimbatore) in mid-2027 and targeting roles in AI infrastructure, platform engineering, and modern compute platforms.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.text: Java, Go, Python, NodeJS, Spring, Microservices, Event-Driven Design, gRPC, Protobuf

skills.title: Cloud & DevOps
skills.text: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Helm, ArgoCD, Prometheus, CloudFormation, AWS CDK, Knative, KEDA, Istio, cert-manager, ECS, EC2, Lambda, SQS, SNS

skills.title: AI / ML Infrastructure
skills.text: Triton Inference Server, RAG / Vector Databases / LLM Inference Stack, GPU workload orchestration on Kubernetes, MLOps / Model Serving, PagedAttention, KV Cache

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.text: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, React.js, Servlets, JSP

skills.title: Databases & Storage
skills.text: Oracle, Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, ElasticSearch, DynamoDB, S3, Distributed Cache

skills.title: Design & Architecture
skills.text: DDD, CQRS, Circuit Breaker, Saga, Distributed Systems, Netflix OSS (Eureka, Hystrix, Feign, Ribbon, Zuul)

skills.title: Reliability & SRE
skills.text: GitOps, CI/CD, Observability, Incident Response, BCDR, High Availability, Fault Tolerance, Resilience Engineering

skills.title: Development Practices
skills.text: SOLID, TDD, Pair Programming, Agile (Scrum/Kanban), Infrastructure as Code

certifications: Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) — In Progress, Expected Sep 2026

experiences.title: Senior Platform Engineer
bullets: Designed and built a highly available serverless platform on Kubernetes using Knative, KEDA, Istio service mesh, and cert-manager
Led nonprod cluster RCA reducing recovery time from 45 to 11 minutes through systematic fault isolation and infrastructure hardening
Implemented observability with Grafana, Loki, Prometheus, and telemetry tooling to monitor system health and service reliability
Managed Kubernetes infrastructure with Helm and ArgoCD for declarative GitOps-based continuous delivery
Built and operated Kubernetes-native production workloads, including Knative services, Istio traffic management, KEDA autoscaling, and Kafka pipelines
Developed AI infrastructure for RAG and LLM inference workloads on Kubernetes, including autoscaled inference jobs and agentic AI patterns
Owned operational health through on-call support, incident response, BCDR planning, and resilience-focused engineering
